## What does this change do?

<!-- Describe the change and why it is needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Testing

- [ ] Existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on hardware (if applicable — describe your setup)

## Checklist

- [ ] `config.toml` is **not** included (add personal config to `.gitignore` or use `config.toml.example`)
- [ ] No credentials, IP addresses, or personal data in committed files
